_delete_after_bootstrap: Delete ALL keys prefixed with '_' (including this one, _instructions, _example) after populating with real data. These are guides, not data.

_instructions.teams: Array of team names the user supports, e.g. ['Canada', 'USA']. Used to personalize the daily digest.
_instructions.players: Array of player names the user follows, e.g. ['Alphonso Davies', 'Jonathan David']. Used to personalize the daily digest.
_instructions.features_activated: Flags that control the universal footer. Set each to true when the user engages: predictions (first prediction), digest (sets up digest), video (requests first video). When a flag is true, its footer line stops appearing.
